flat_2025.label: Flat from 2025
flat_2025.description: Keeps each service demand at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
flat_2025.provenance_note: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

simple_sector_growth_low.label: Simple sector growth - low
simple_sector_growth_low.description: A conservative growth preset for quick configuration setup.
simple_sector_growth_low.provenance_note: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

simple_sector_growth_central.label: Simple sector growth - central
simple_sector_growth_central.description: Default built-in growth preset by sector or service for fast exploration. Values are modest and intentionally generic.
simple_sector_growth_central.provenance_note: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

simple_sector_growth_high.label: Simple sector growth - high
simple_sector_growth_high.description: A stronger demand-growth preset for sensitivity testing.
simple_sector_growth_high.provenance_note: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.
